case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: 2009 AUDI QUATTRO et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY RESPONDENT MC CARTY, CARSON AS TO PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: 2009 AUDI QUATTRO 4DR CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NO. 6GTB495, VIN: WAUSF78K59A093530; $1,000.00 US CURRENCY; $23,331.50 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY BRENDAN HALLINAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT CARSON MCCARTY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $20,000.00 US CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MC CARTY, CARSON
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS (H&S 11488.4(A); 11488.5(A)(1)) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: 2009 AUDI QUATTRO 4DR CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NO. 6GTB495, VIN: WAUSF78K59A093530 ALL ASSETS IN BANK OF AMERICA ACCOUNT NUMBER 0002- 9454-0909 THOSE ASSETS BEING $3,289.99 U.S. CURRENCY ALL ASSETS IN BANK OF AMERICA ACCOUNT NUMBER 0002- 8026-6684 THOSE ASSETS BEING $40,041.51 U.S. CURRENCY $1,000 (ONE THOUSAND DOLLARS) U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY CARSON MCCARTY FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
